title: deer-flow.agent.thread v1
description: Lifecycle of an agent thread (Claude Code, opencode, codex, gemini) spawned or observed by deer-flow. Distinct from agent.session.v1 which is published by external shadow-binary wrappers: this event is authored by deer-flow itself when it dispatches or tracks a thread it owns. Source: /deer-flow/dispatch.

thread_id.description: Unique identifier for this agent thread — stable across paused/resumed transitions

project.description: Project directory basename the agent is working in

pane_id.description: ZELLIJ_PANE_ID or tmux pane identifier if the thread runs in a pane

saga_id.description: bus.saga correlation ID if this thread is executing a coordinated plan

title.description: Human-readable task description from the dispatching bead or prompt — first 120 chars

status.description: Fine-grained operational status within the current event

context_size_tokens.description: Approximate context window consumption at event time

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — when this thread was first started

last_activity_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — last observed activity timestamp
